summary_line: Player tracking and field projection stayed mostly intact across 250 frames, but ball coverage was very sparse and the only experiment is not goal-aligned for this clip.

diagnostics.title: Field map held up
diagnostics.message: Field registration covered 2708 projected player points with a 0.9952 registered ratio. Calibration refresh succeeded 19 times out of 25 attempts (0.76), and the last good calibration was at frame 240 of 249.
diagnostics.next_step: Use projected player coordinates for this clip, but inspect frames 241-249 to confirm the final calibration state did not drift after the last good frame.

diagnostics.title: Ball tracking is mostly missing
diagnostics.message: Only 19 ball rows were produced over 250 frames, or 0.076 detections per frame. There is just 1 ball track ID, so continuity exists only where the ball was found, but coverage is too thin for possession or event review.
diagnostics.next_step: Re-run this clip with ball detection as the primary check and inspect the 231 frames with no ball row before using any ball-derived outputs.

diagnostics.title: Player count is light
diagnostics.message: Average player detections were 10.884 per frame, which is below a full 22-player view and suggests many players were off-screen or missed. The run created 34 unique player track IDs over 250 frames, with a churn ratio of 0.136 and no tracklet merges applied.
diagnostics.next_step: Review camera framing and occlusion in this clip, then re-run with tracker tuning or stitching enabled if you need cleaner player continuity.

diagnostics.title: Team split is uneven
diagnostics.message: Team assignment covered all tracks with 0 unassigned, but the split is 23 home tracks vs 11 away tracks. That gap may reflect visibility bias or clustering error rather than actual on-pitch balance. Team cluster distance is 0.1889, which does not remove that uncertainty by itself.
diagnostics.next_step: Spot-check jersey clustering on several away players and verify whether the away side was actually less visible before trusting team-level counts.

diagnostics.title: Experiment is not goal-linked
diagnostics.message: The clip has 0 goal events, and derived metrics mark the experiment as not goal-aligned. In the volatility experiment, average vol index is 0.0, 30s pre-goal index is 0.0, baseline is 0.0, and uplift is 0.0, so there is no goal-window readout to interpret here.
diagnostics.next_step: Do not use this run to judge pre-goal volatility behavior; test the experiment on clips with annotated goals or use non-goal analysis criteria.
